_bench_bfloat16_roundtrip_proxy:
00000001000011ec	stp	d9, d8, [sp, #-0x50]!
00000001000011f0	stp	x24, x23, [sp, #0x10]
00000001000011f4	stp	x22, x21, [sp, #0x20]
00000001000011f8	stp	x20, x19, [sp, #0x30]
00000001000011fc	stp	x29, x30, [sp, #0x40]
0000000100001200	add	x29, sp, #0x40
0000000100001204	mov	x20, x0

000000010000120c	ldr	w8, [x8, #0x14]
0000000100001210	cbnz	w8, 0x100001220
0000000100001214	adrp	x0, 7 ; 0x100008000
0000000100001218	add	x0, x0, #0x10
000000010000121c	bl	0x100002304 ; symbol stub for: _mach_timebase_info
0000000100001220	bl	0x1000022f8 ; symbol stub for: _mach_absolute_time
0000000100001224	mov	x19, x0

000000010000122c	add	x21, x21, #0x10
0000000100001230	ldp	w22, w23, [x21]
0000000100001234	cbz	x20, 0x1000012c0
0000000100001238	mov	x8, #0x0
000000010000123c	fmov	s0, #1.00000000
